original text:
#FDFEFF (or 0xFDFEFF) is unknown color: approx Alice Blue. HEX triplet: FD, FE and FF. RGB value is (253,254,255). Sum of RGB (Red+Green+Blue) = 253+254+255=762 (100% of max value = 765). Red value is 253 (99.22% from 255 or 33.20% from 762); Green value is 254 (99.61% from 255 or 33.33% from 762); Blue value is 255 (100% from 255 or 33.46% from 762); Max value from RGB is 255 - color contains mainly: blue. Hex color #FDFEFF is not a web safe color. Web safe color analog (approx): #FFFFFF. Inversed color of #FDFEFF is #020100. Grayscale: #FDFDFD. Windows color (decimal): -131329 or 16776957. OLE color: 16776957.
HSL color Cylindrical-coordinate representation of color #FDFEFF: hue angle of 210º degrees, saturation: 1, lightness: 1%. HSV value (or HSB Brightness) of color is 1% and HSV saturation: 0.01%. Process color model (Four color, CMYK) of #FDFEFF is Cyan = 0.01, Magento = 0.00, Yellow = 0 and Black (K on CMYK) = 0.

original text:
#e0115f hex color is (224, 17, 95) in RGB color palette. Closest web safe color is #cc0066.
#e0115f hex code consists of 224 red value, 17 green and 95 blue. In HSL notation it has 337.4 hue, 85.9 saturation and 47.3 lightness. The process color (CMYK) is combination of 0 cyan, 92 magenta, 58 yellow and 12 key (black).
Shades are created by adding a black color. The lightest one in this statement is #d21059, whereas #540723 is the darkest.
Tints are formed by combining with white color. The brightest one of the following tints is #ffffff, and the darkest is #ef2b75.
Some of pre-made examples using #e0115f hex color in HTML.

This page lists many detailed information about the hex color #64954B. Its Hexadecimal code is 64954B. In a RGB color space, which is consist of 39.22% red, 58.43% green and 29.41% blue, and that corresponding RGB values are 100, 149, 75. In a CMYK color space, it is consist of 32.9% cyan, 0% magenta, 49.7% yellow and 41.6% black, whereas that corresponding CMYK values are 0.33, 0, 0.5, 0.42. #  group/user name, client host id and a depot file path pattern.
#  A user gets the highest privilege granted on any line.
#               preceded by '=' are rights; all other modes are levels.
#  Group/User indicator: either 'group' or 'user'.
#  Name:        A Perforce group or user name; may be wildcarded.
#               all IPv4 addresses which start with 172.16.
#  Path:        The part of the depot being granted access.
